hero.subtitle: Building Robust Web Architectures with Symfony & Vue.js.
hero.description: Senior Fullstack Developer with over 10 years of experience. I specialize in engineering high-performance digital ecosystems. From complex backend logic in PHP/Symfony to reactive interfaces in Vue.js, my focus is on functional aesthetics and scalable code.

about.title: about_me
about.headline: Architecting {scalable} systems with technical precision.
about.description: Fullstack developer with more than 10 years of experience. I am motivated by projects with real impact, teams with good communication and environments where technical opinion counts. Specialized in the development of robust and scalable architectures.
about.ready_to_scale: Ready to scale your next big idea?
about.ready_description: I'm currently accepting new projects and consulting opportunities. Let's build something exceptional together.

projects.title: projects.src
projects.description: Selection of personal projects and architectural solutions developed with Symfony, Vue.js and Docker.

contact.headline: Let's build something {architectural}.
contact.description: If you need a robust Symfony backend, a reactive Vue.js interface or a complete systems architecture, I am open to collaborations and specialized projects.
